scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c green,blue "npm run dev -w @rexalgo/frontend" "npm run dev -w @rexalgo/backend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @rexalgo/frontend && npm run build -w @rexalgo/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @rexalgo/frontend --if-present && npm run lint -w @rexalgo/backend --if-present
